sourcesContent:
import { CCol, CForm, CFormInput, CContainer, CRow, CFormTextarea } from '@coreui/react';
import React from 'react';

const MagazineComponent = () => {
    return (
        <CContainer className="d-flex justify-content-center align-items-start" style={{ minHeight: '50vh', paddingTop: '2rem' }}>
            <CRow className="w-100">
                <CCol md={12}>
                    <CForm>
                        <CFormInput
                            type="text"
                            id="exampleFormControlInput1"
                            label="Email address"
                            placeholder="name@example.com"
                            text="Must be 8-20 characters long."
                            aria-describedby="exampleFormControlInputHelpInline"
                        />
                    </CForm>
                </CCol>
                <CCol md={12} className="mt-3">
                    <CForm>
                        <CFormTextarea
                            id="exampleFormControlTextarea1"
                            label="Meta Description"
                            placeholder="Enter meta description here"
                            rows="4"
                            name="metaDescription"
                            // onChange={(e) => onHandleChange(e, "metaDescription")}
                        />
                    </CForm>
                </CCol>
                <CCol md={12} className="mt-3">
                    <CForm>
                        <CFormInput
                            type="text"
                            id="exampleFormControlInput3"
                            label="Email address"
                            placeholder="name@example.com"
                            text="Must be 8-20 characters long."
                            aria-describedby="exampleFormControlInputHelpInline"
                        />
                    </CForm>
                </CCol>
            </CRow>
        </CContainer>
    );
};

export default MagazineComponent;
